message:
fix(fm-render-canvas): fix swapped label branches and apply clippy lints

Fix a logic bug in fragment label rendering where the empty/non-empty
label branches were swapped — the compound "[kind] label" format was
shown when label was empty and vice versa. Also replace .iter() with
idiomatic for-in loops on references, and add missing semicolon on
draw_circle call.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
